title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCIV. Games.
content:
Tom Brown's two little Indian boys,
            One ran away,
            The other wouldn't stay, - 
        Tom Brown's two little Indian boys.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCIV. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
